# SkipNav

Accessibility utility components for skip navigation. Provides a visually hidden link that becomes visible on keyboard focus, allowing users to skip directly to the main content area.

## Import

```jsx
import { SkipNavLink, SkipNavContent } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Exports

| Export | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `SkipNavLink` | A visually hidden link that becomes visible on focus, typically placed at the top of the page. |
| `SkipNavContent` | The target anchor that the skip link navigates to, placed at the beginning of main content. |

## Usage

### Basic Skip Navigation

```jsx
function App() {
  return (
    <>
      <SkipNavLink>Skip to content</SkipNavLink>
      <header>
        <nav>{/* Navigation links */}</nav>
      </header>
      <SkipNavContent />
      <main>
        <p>Main content starts here.</p>
      </main>
    </>
  );
}
```

### Custom Skip Link Text

```jsx
<SkipNavLink>Skip to main content</SkipNavLink>
{/* ... header and navigation ... */}
<SkipNavContent />
<main>
  {/* Main content */}
</main>
```
